title: centaurea troitzkyi
intro: Centaurea troitzkyi, also known as Troitzky's knapweed, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This perennial plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centaurea troitzkyi include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and wounds. Centaurea troitzkyi is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
